{{Quote|I'm a healer for the clan.|Vurlene|<ref name="SWG:Vurlene">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Vurlene|Dathomir}}</ref>}}
'''Vurlene''' was a [[Witches of Dathomir|Witch of Dathomir]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], she was a healer for the [[Singing Mountain Clan]]. She once sent an individual to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to meet with [[Skub]], a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] holy man who had discovered a form of algae with properties similar to [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] whom she had learned about through a book, to gain a sample of the algae as she thought that it would be well suited to the environs of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="SWG:Vurlene" />
{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Vurlene was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:Vurlene" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Vurlene was one of the quest givers of the original "[[W:c:swg:Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park|Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park]]."<ref name="SWG:Vurlene" /> This quest series was removed from the game upon the release of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Witches of Dathomir Theme Park|Witches of Dathomir Theme Park]]," introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Game Update 19|Game Update 19]] on [[December 14]], [[2010]].<ref name="GU19">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1160720|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: Game Update 19}}</ref> Vurlene's original quests were totally removed as the character was included in the new questline.<ref name="SWG:TttSM" />
